title: Jennifer Runyon, ‘Ghostbusters’ and ‘Charles in Charge’ Actress, Dies at 65
content:
ByArushi Jacob

Jennifer Runyon, an actress known for her roles in “Ghostbusters” and the CBS sitcom “Charles in Charge,” died March 6. She was 65.Runyon’s close friend, Erin Murphy, confirmed her death in aFacebook post, writing, “So sad to share that my friend Jennifer Runyon Corman has passed away after a brief battle with cancer. Some people you just know you’ll be friends with before you even meet. She was a special lady. I’ll miss you Jenn. My thoughts are with your family and beautiful children.”

Runyon made her feature film debut in the 1980 slasher film “To All a Good Night” and went on to have supporting roles in the comedies “Up the Creek” and “Ghostbusters,” both released in 1984.The actress also had a lead role as Gwendolyn Pierce in the 1984 sitcom “Charles in Charge” during the show’s first season. In 1988, she portrayed Cindy Brady in the television film “A Very Brady Christmas.” Also in 1988, Runyon played the lead in “The In Crowd” and was in the pilot of “Quantum Leap.” She also starred in the comedy “18 Again!,” and made guest appearances on “Murder, She Wrote,” “A Man Called Sarge,” and “Beverly Hills, 90210.”Runyon was born on April 1, 1960, in Chicago, Ill. to radio announcer and disc jockey Jim Runyon and actress Jane Roberts.In 1991, Runyon married Todd Corman, a collegiate basketball coach who also worked in film and television production between sports seasons. The couple have two children: a son named Wyatt and a daughter named Bayley.In 2014, Runyon stated she was semi-retired from acting and was instead working as a teacher.“She will always be remembered for her love of life and her devotion to her family and friends,” read her Facebook tribute post. “I know from above she’s looking down on all of us with her beautiful smile. Rest in peace, our Jenn.”
title_zh: 詹妮弗·魯尼恩(Jennifer Runyon)，因出演《靈異鬼照片》(Ghostbusters) 和《查理掌控一切》(Charles in Charge) 而聞名的女演員，於65歲時去世。
content_zh:
由阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)報導

珍妮佛·朗恩(Jennifer Runyon)，因在《鬼玩人(Ghostbusters)》和CBS情境喜劇《查爾斯掌權(Charles in Charge)》中的角色而聞名的女演員，於3月6日去世，享年65歲。朗恩的摯友艾琳·墨菲(Erin Murphy)在Facebook上確認了她的死訊，寫道：「很難過地分享我的朋友珍妮佛·朗恩·科曼(Jennifer Runyon Corman)在與癌症的短暫鬥爭後去世。有些人你在見面前就知道會成為朋友。她是一位特別的女士。我會想念你，珍。我的心與你的家人和美麗的孩子們同在。」

朗恩於1980年的恐怖片《祝大家晚安(To All a Good Night)》中首次亮相，隨後在1984年上映的喜劇《溪邊的日子(Up the Creek)》和《鬼玩人(Ghostbusters)》中擔任配角。這位女演員在1984年情境喜劇《查爾斯掌權(Charles in Charge)》的第一季中擔任主角關德琳·皮爾斯(Gwendolyn Pierce)。1988年，她在電視電影《布雷迪家族的聖誕節(A Very Brady Christmas)》中飾演辛迪·布雷迪(Cindy Brady)。同年，朗恩在《流行圈(The In Crowd)》中擔任主角，並參加了《量子跳躍(Quantum Leap)》的試播集。她還主演了喜劇《18 Again!》，並在《謀殺她寫的(Murder, She Wrote)》、《一位名叫薩吉的男人(A Man Called Sarge)》和《比佛利山莊90210(Beverly Hills, 90210)》中客串演出。

朗恩於1960年4月1日出生於伊利諾伊州芝加哥，父親是廣播播音員和DJ吉姆·朗恩(Jim Runyon)，母親是女演員簡·羅伯茨(Jane Roberts)。1991年，朗恩與大學籃球教練托德·科曼(Todd Corman)結婚，托德在體育賽季之間也從事電影和電視製作。這對夫妻育有兩名子女：一名兒子名叫懷亞特(Wyatt)，一名女兒名叫貝莉(Bayley)。2014年，朗恩表示她已半退休，轉而擔任教師。「她將永遠被人們記住，因為她對生活的熱愛以及對家人和朋友的奉獻。」她的Facebook悼文中寫道。「我知道她在天上用她美麗的微笑注視著我們所有人。安息吧，我們的珍。」
summary_zh:
由阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)報導

珍妮佛·朗恩(Jennifer Runyon)，因在《鬼玩人(Ghostbusters)》和CBS情境喜劇《查爾斯掌權(Charles in Charge)》中的角色而聞名的女演員，於3月6日去世，享年65歲。
